name: Oracle MICROS Simphony Restaurant POS REST API
what_it_does: Oracle MICROS Simphony restaurant POS REST API for enterprise restaurant chains, hotel food and beverage operations, and stadium/arena concessions to manage order processing, kitchen display, menu management, loyalty integration, revenue reporting, and multi-location restaurant operations — enabling automated restaurant order flow, menu configuration, loyalty redemption, sales analytics, and kitchen orchestration through Oracle's industry-leading enterprise restaurant POS platform. Enables AI agents to manage menu management for item, price, and modifier configuration across locations automation, handle transaction processing for order and payment transaction automation, access kitchen display integration for KDS order routing and timing automation, retrieve sales reporting for revenue, product mix, and labor reporting automation, manage loyalty integration for Oracle rewards and third-party loyalty automation, handle employee management for clock-in/out and timesheet automation, access void and refund for transaction correction workflow automation, retrieve inventory integration for menu item depletion tracking automation, manage table management for full-service table turn and cover automation, and integrate Simphony with hotel PMS, delivery platforms, and loyalty systems for enterprise F&B automation.
use_cases: Managing restaurant menus and pricing across enterprise chains for multi-location automation agents
Processing restaurant orders and integrating with kitchen display for F&B automation agents
Reporting sales and product mix for restaurant analytics and operations automation agents
Integrating restaurant POS with hotel PMS for charge-to-room and F&B cost automation agents
not_for: Food trucks and single-location small restaurants (Simphony is enterprise-grade, complex for small operators)
Retail point-of-sale (Simphony is restaurant-specific, not general merchandise retail POS)
Ghost kitchens without physical POS terminals (Simphony is enterprise POS with hardware, not cloud-only)
best_when: An enterprise restaurant chain, hotel F&B operation, stadium concession, or quick-service franchise wanting AI agents to automate menu management, order processing, sales analytics, and kitchen orchestration through Oracle MICROS Simphony's enterprise-grade restaurant POS.
avoid_when: ORACLE HOSPITALITY CONTRACT REQUIRED: Simphony requires enterprise Oracle Hospitality agreement; automated open-developer assumption creates enterprise_required; automated must be Oracle Hospitality restaurant customer. SIMPHONY CLOUD VS ON-PREM DIFFER: Simphony has cloud (Simphony Cloud) and on-premises versions with different APIs; automated unified assumption creates endpoint_mismatch; automated must use correct API for cloud vs on-premises deployment. EXTENSIBILITY FRAMEWORK IS REQUIRED: Third-party integrations use Simphony's extensibility framework (SFTP, Simphony Cloud API); automated direct-database assumption creates integration_not_supported for bypassing official integration methods; automated must use Simphony's approved integration approach. MENU SYNCHRONIZATION IS CRITICAL: Multi-location menu updates require proper synchronization; automated instant-propagation assumption creates sync_delay for menu changes not yet propagated to all POS terminals; automated must monitor menu sync status after updates.

auth.notes: Oracle MICROS Simphony uses OAuth2 for restaurant POS REST API. REST API with JSON. Austin, TX HQ (Oracle). MICROS acquired by Oracle 2014 ($5.3B). Products: Simphony Cloud POS, Simphony on-premises, MICROS 3700, Kitchen Display. Used by McDonald's, Starbucks, Marriott F&B. 400,000+ restaurant and hotel locations. Competes with PAR Brink, Toast, and NCR Aloha for enterprise restaurant POS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for enterprise restaurant brands; production requires Oracle Hospitality agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly subscription per location; Simphony Cloud Essentials, Plus, and Premium tiers; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Austin TX. Oracle subsidiary. Monthly per-location. McDonald's, Starbucks, Marriott F&B. Enterprise restaurant leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; POS and reporting APIs designed for high-volume restaurant operations

known_agent_gotchas: REVENUE CENTER IS KEY SCOPE: Simphony operations are scoped to revenue centers (individual restaurant/bar within hotel); automated single-venue assumption creates scope_error for multi-revenue-center properties like hotels with multiple F&B outlets; automated must scope operations to correct revenue center

MENU ITEM IDs ARE PROPERTY-SPECIFIC: Menu item and modifier IDs differ by property; automated universal-menu-id assumption creates item_not_found for IDs from different Simphony instances; automated must query item IDs from specific property's configuration

CHECK LIFECYCLE IS MANAGED: Restaurant checks follow open → ordered → paid → closed lifecycle; automated arbitrary-check assumption creates check_state_error for operations on checks in wrong state; automated must respect check lifecycle states

CLOUD AND ON-PREM API DIFFER: Simphony Cloud and on-premises have different API endpoints and authentication; automated version-agnostic assumption creates endpoint_not_found for cloud APIs called against on-premises instance; automated must target correct deployment type

TENDER MEDIA MAPPING: Payment tender types must map to Simphony-configured tender media; automated standard-payment assumption creates unrecognized_tender for payment types not configured as tender media; automated must use property's configured tender media IDs
agent_readiness.security_notes: Restaurant POS. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Restaurant order and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise restaurant POS. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Restaurant transaction data.
